title: Pack Of Tekad
description: simple optimization modpack designed for ice boat racing but usable elsewhere
body:
![Ice Boat racing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6514691572be1ab53370505c12b76c6cfc89effe.png)

I created a pack with several optimisation mods and boat racing mods that can be used on the servers:
- frosthex.com
- mc.boatlabs.net

the pack should also work on any vanilla based server as well.


<details>
<summary>included items</summary>

## included in this pack:
- 3d skin layers
- animatica
- appleskin
- boathud
- cat vision
- cloth config api
- collective
- complementary shaders reimagined
- concurrent chunk management engine
- continuity
- default dark mode texture pack
- entity culling
- essentials mod
- fabric api
- kotlin
- fertite core
- forge config api
- fresh animations texture pack
- imediately fast
- indium
- iris shaders
- jade
- just enough items
- krypton
- lamb dynamic lighting
- lithium
- mod menu
- model gap fix
- no chat reports
- not enough animations
- open parties and claims
- open boat utils
- reeses sodium options
- simple voice chat
- sodium
- text placeholder api
- xaero's minimap
- xaero's world map
- YetAnotherConfigLibrary
- zoomify
- Entity Model Features
- Entity texture features
- Boatcam

</details>
